coze_input.funnel_insight: The largest drop-off is from product view to add-to-cart.
coze_input.priority_segment: Carted but not purchased users with high predicted purchase probability.
coze_input.recommended_action: Target the high and very_high carted non-purchasers with remarketing incentives.
coze_input.modeling_note: Training excludes purchase-derived features to avoid target leakage.
